title: Impact Mapping
author: Gojko Adzic
summary: 以「目標 → 角色 → 影響 → 交付物」四層提問對齊產品決策，確保做的每件事都連回商業目標。
summaryEn: A four-layer questioning technique — goal → actor → impact → deliverable — that aligns product decisions so every piece of work traces back to a business goal.

title: Wardley Maps
author: Simon Wardley
summary: 把價值鏈與元件演化畫在同一張地圖上，讓策略討論有地形可循 — 全書 19 章免費線上閱讀，另有印刷版與電子書。
summaryEn: Plot your value chain against component evolution on one map, so strategy discussions have terrain to reason over — all 19 chapters free to read online, with print and e-book editions too.

title: Cynefin: Weaving Sense-Making into the Fabric of Our World
author: Dave Snowden 等
summary: Cynefin 框架：辨識問題處於清晰、繁雜、複雜或混沌情境，選擇對應的決策與探索方式。
summaryEn: The Cynefin framework: recognise whether a problem is clear, complicated, complex, or chaotic, and choose the decision-making and exploration approach that fits.

title: 領域故事化（Domain Storytelling）
author: Stefan Hofer、Henning Schwentner
summary: 以協作、視覺化的「說領域故事」方式捕捉領域知識，讓業務與開發對齊 — 繁中版由社群共同創辦人高翊凱（Kim Kao）與核心志工陳勉修（Michael Chen）技術審校。
summaryEn: Capture domain knowledge through collaborative, visual "domain stories" that keep business and development aligned — the Traditional Chinese edition was technically reviewed by community co-founder Kim Kao and core volunteer Michael Chen.

title: Introducing EventStorming
author: Alberto Brandolini
summary: Event Storming 發明人的第一手著作：用大規模協作工作坊探索複雜業務領域 — 社群年會工作坊的核心方法。
summaryEn: The first-hand book from the inventor of EventStorming: exploring complex business domains through large-scale collaborative workshops — a core method in the community's conference workshops.

title: Specification by Example
author: Gojko Adzic
summary: Jolt 獎經典：用關鍵實例把需求說清楚、讓文件永遠活著 — Example Mapping 等實踐的思想源頭。
summaryEn: A Jolt Award classic: nail down requirements with key examples and keep documentation alive — the wellspring of practices like Example Mapping.

title: Learning Domain-Driven Design
author: Vlad Khononov
summary: 以現代視角重整 DDD 的入門書，戰略與戰術並重 — 建議的第一本。
summaryEn: A modern reframing of DDD for newcomers, balancing strategic and tactical design — our recommended first read.

title: Domain-Driven Design: Tackling Complexity in the Heart of Software
author: Eric Evans
summary: DDD 的起點。Ubiquitous Language、Bounded Context 與戰略設計的原典。
summaryEn: Where DDD began — the original text on Ubiquitous Language, Bounded Context, and strategic design.

title: Implementing Domain-Driven Design
author: Vaughn Vernon
summary: 把 DDD 落到程式碼與架構的實作指南，紅皮書。
summaryEn: The hands-on guide to bringing DDD down to code and architecture — the "red book".

title: Domain Modeling Made Functional
author: Scott Wlaschin
summary: 用函數式思維與型別系統做領域建模。
summaryEn: Domain modelling with functional thinking and a strong type system.

title: 解構領域驅動設計
author: 張逸
summary: 提出領域驅動設計統一過程（DDDUP），從全域分析、架構映射到領域建模的完整方法論 — Kim Kao 撰寫推薦序。
summaryEn: Introduces the Domain-Driven Design Unified Process (DDDUP) — a full methodology spanning global analysis, architecture mapping, and domain modelling, with a foreword by Kim Kao. (Chinese-language book.)

title: Domain-Driven Design: The First 15 Years（社群中譯版）
author: DDD Europe 選輯 · DDD Taiwan 十位社群志工共同翻譯
authorEn: DDD Europe anthology · translated by ten DDD Taiwan volunteers
summary: DDD 十五週年紀念文集（Fowler、Coplien、Wirfs-Brock 等撰文），社群翻譯為繁體中文，Leanpub 免費線上閱讀。
summaryEn: A 15th-anniversary anthology (essays by Fowler, Coplien, Wirfs-Brock, and more), translated into Traditional Chinese by the community — free to read on Leanpub.

title: Software Systems Architecture（2nd Edition）
author: Nick Rozanski、Eoin Woods
summary: 以 7 個 Viewpoints 與 8 個 Perspectives 面對多元利害關係人的架構方法論 — 持續演進架構實踐的重要基石。
summaryEn: An architecture methodology built on 7 viewpoints and 8 perspectives for serving diverse stakeholders — a cornerstone of continuous-architecture practice.

title: 建構多租戶 SaaS 架構（Building Multi-Tenant SaaS Architectures）
author: Tod Golding
summary: 多租戶 SaaS 架構的原則、實踐與模式 — 呼應社群對韌性系統設計的關注，繁中版由 Kim Kao 撰寫推薦序。
summaryEn: Principles, practices, and patterns for multi-tenant SaaS architecture — resonating with the community's focus on resilient system design; the Traditional Chinese edition carries a foreword by Kim Kao.

title: SRE 實踐與開發平台指南
author: 黃冠元（Rick Hwang）
summary: 從團隊協作、原則、架構到趨勢，掌握 SRE 與平台工程全局的決策指南 — Kim Kao 撰寫推薦序。
summaryEn: From team collaboration and principles to architecture and trends — a decision guide across SRE and platform engineering, with a foreword by Kim Kao. (Chinese-language book.)
